summary: Executed backend + frontend integration testing for reminder banner, quick-entry revenue save, revenue signals, weekly review packet/PDF, auth guards, and core navigation regressions. All executed automated tests passed.
action_items: No blocking defects found in this run; keep running regression suite in CI for every PR.
critical_code_review_comments: No critical code-quality or runtime issues found in reviewed files for this scope.
Non-blocking maintainability note: /revenue and /logs pages duplicate data-fetch logic between useEffect and local load() helper.
seed_data_creation: Created temporary test users via /rpc/register during automation: pw.reminder.20260303114244@zcvios.local and pytest.strategy.*@zcvios.local accounts; created associated revenue/log entries.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reminder banner behavior validated on Tuesday precondition using a fresh user with no weekly revenue. Quick-entry modal save removed reminder banner and refreshed dashboard state. Weekly report showed saved signal metrics and PDF download toast succeeded. /rpc/reports/weekly-review returned {"error":"Unauthorized"} after logout.
rca of the issue: No defects reproduced in this scope. Strategy trigger scope validated by API behavior: /rpc/logs save did not change weekly strategy output; /rpc/revenue save updated strategy context and weeklySignals as expected.
